entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An important food and cash crop globally, scientifically known as Arachis hypogaea L., produced in eastern Ethiopia

entities.name: EASTERN ETHIOPIA
entities.description: A region in Ethiopia known for groundnut production but facing low productivity due to various constraints

entities.name: BABILE
entities.description: A major groundnut-producing district in eastern Ethiopia

entities.name: FEDIS
entities.description: A major groundnut-producing district in eastern Ethiopia

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY RURAL APPRAISAL
entities.description: A study approach used to assess farmers' perceived production constraints, variety choice, and preferred traits

entities.name: SEMI-STRUCTURED QUESTIONNAIRE
entities.description: A data collection tool used within the participatory rural appraisal studies

entities.name: TRANSECT WALKS
entities.description: A data collection tool used within the participatory rural appraisal studies

entities.name: FOCUS GROUP DISCUSSIONS
entities.description: A data collection tool used within the participatory rural appraisal studies

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: The leading constraint to groundnut production, mainly occurring during the flowering stage

entities.name: POOR SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: A production constraint reported by 88% of respondents

entities.name: LACK OF ACCESS TO IMPROVED SEED
entities.description: A production constraint reported by 67% of respondents

entities.name: PRE-HARVEST DISEASES
entities.description: A production constraint reported by 59.5% of respondents

entities.name: INADEQUATE ACCESS TO EXTENSION SERVICES
entities.description: A production constraint reported by 41.5% of respondents

entities.name: LIMITED ACCESS TO CREDIT
entities.description: A production constraint reported by 21.5% of respondents

entities.name: LIMITED AVAILABILITY OF IMPROVED VARIETIES
entities.description: A production constraint reported by 18.5% of respondents

entities.name: HIGH SHELLED YIELD
entities.description: A farmer-preferred trait reported by 27.67% of respondents

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: A farmer-preferred trait reported by 16.84% of respondents

entities.name: TOLERANCE TO DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: A farmer-preferred trait reported by 13.67% of respondents

entities.name: MARKET VALUE
entities.description: A farmer-preferred trait reported by 11.17% of respondents

entities.name: GOOD SEED QUALITY
entities.description: A farmer-preferred trait reported by 10% of respondents

entities.name: ADAPTABILITY TO LOCAL GROWING CONDITIONS
entities.description: A farmer-preferred trait reported by 5.8% of respondents

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO DISEASES
entities.description: A farmer-preferred trait reported by 5.17% of respondents

entities.name: GROUNDNUT BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing and releasing groundnut varieties based on farmer preferences and production constraints
